$comment: categoryKeys = full persisted category vocabulary (Category.name.lowercase(), native enum declaration order; order NON-SEMANTIC — persisted values are an unordered set). selectableCategoryKeys = the currently user-facing subset (4 reachable via onboarding/Me/Discover), in FilterCategory DISPLAY order — order IS meaningful (Me halo row + Discover filter bar render order). Expanding it is a one-line change here + consumer pin bumps. selectableCategoryKeys MUST be a subset of categoryKeys — build.mjs throws at generation time on drift. preferredCategories field-type tightening (user-record.schema.json) deferred until web value-parity is verified.
